name: Peter
short_bio: The 1st pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from c. 30 to 64 or 67. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Bethsaida of Galilee.

short_bio: The 249th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 19, 28.V, 4.VI.1769 to 22.IX.1774. His secular name is listed as Giovanni Vincenzo Antonio (Lorenzo) Ganganelli. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Sant'Arcangelo di Romagna.

name: Pius VI
short_bio: The 250th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 15, 22.II.1775 to 29.VIII.1799. His secular name is listed as Giannangelo Braschi. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Cesena.

name: Pius VII
short_bio: The 251st pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 14, 21.III.1800 to 20.VIII.1823. His secular name is listed as Barnaba (Gregorio) Chiaramonti. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Cesena.

name: Leo XII
short_bio: The 252nd pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 28.IX, 5.X.1823 to 10.II.1829. His secular name is listed as Annibale della Genga. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Monticelli di Genga (Fabriano).

name: Pius VIII
short_bio: The 253rd pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 31.III, 5.IV.1829 to 30.XI.1830. His secular name is listed as Francesco Saverio Castiglioni. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Cingoli.

name: Gregory XVI
short_bio: The 254th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 2, 6.II.1831 to 1.VI.1846. His secular name is listed as Bartolomeo Alberto (Mauro) Cappellari. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Belluno.

name: Pius IX
short_bio: The 255th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 16, 21.VI.1846 to 7.II.1878. His secular name is listed as Giovanni Maria Mastai Ferretti. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Senigallia.

name: Leo XIII
short_bio: The 256th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 20.II, 3.III.1878 to 20.VII.1903. His secular name is listed as Vincenzo Gioacchino Pecci. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Carpineto Romano.

name: Pius X
short_bio: The 257th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 4, 9.VIII.1903 to 20.VIII.1914. His secular name is listed as Giuseppe Melchiorre Sarto. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Riese (Treviso).

name: Benedict XV
short_bio: The 258th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 3, 6.IX.1914 to 22.I.1922. His secular name is listed as Giacomo della Chiesa.

name: Pius XI
short_bio: The 259th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 6, 12.II.1922 to 10.II.1939. His secular name is listed as Achille Ratti. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Desio (Milan).

name: Pius XII
short_bio: The 260th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 2, 12.III.1939 to 9.X.1958. His secular name is listed as Eugenio Pacelli. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Rome.

name: John XXIII
short_bio: The 261st pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 28.X, 4.XI.1958 to 3.VI.1963. His secular name is listed as Angelo Giuseppe Roncalli. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Sotto il Monte (Bergamo).

name: Paul VI
short_bio: The 262nd pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 21, 30.VI.1963 to 6.VIII.1978. His secular name is listed as Giovanni Battista Montini. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Concesio (Brescia).

name: John Paul I
short_bio: The 263rd pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 26.VIII, 3.IX.1978 to 28.IX.1978. His secular name is listed as Albino Luciani. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Forno di Canale (Belluno).

citations.source: The Holy See, John Paul I

name: John Paul II
short_bio: The 264th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 16, 22.X.1978 to 2.IV.2005. His secular name is listed as Karol Wojtyła. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Wadowice (Kraków).

citations.source: The Holy See, John Paul II

name: Benedict XVI
short_bio: The 265th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 19, 24.IV.2005 to 28.II.2013. His secular name is listed as Joseph Ratzinger. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Marktl am Inn (Bavaria).

name: Francis
short_bio: The 266th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 13, 19.III.2013 to 21.IV.2025. His secular name is listed as Jorge Mario Bergoglio. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Buenos Aires (Argentina).

name: Leo XIV
short_bio: The 267th pope in the Holy See's list of Supreme Pontiffs, serving as Bishop of Rome from 8, 18.V.2025 to present. His secular name is listed as Robert Francis Prevost. The Holy See lists his birthplace as Chicago.
